APPEARANCES:
Jennifer L. Alesio of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for moving party Brayton Purcell

RULING:
BRAYTON PURCELL'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFFS GARY BROWN & CANDACE BROWN

No objection made and tentative ruling adopted: Brayton Purcell's motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiffs is denied as untimely. Brayton Purcell failed to provide proper notice as required by C.C.P. 1005(b). Service by mail on April 17, 2013 to an address in Idaho with a May 16, 2013 hearing date did not provide sufficient notice to plaintiffs pursuant to C.C.P. 1005(b). The motion is denied without prejudice to being re-filed as long as proper notice is provided to plaintiffs. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Miles Lendway of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #13684 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
